findings.finding: Study design, randomization, blinding, and comparator details are not specified.
findings.evidence: No structured study design field or criterion-level design detail found.
findings.recommendation: Clarify whether the study is randomized, blinded, placebo-controlled, active-comparator, or single-arm.

findings.finding: Recruitment assumption is provided without feasibility rationale.
findings.evidence: Single-center oncology clinic recruitment, 60 participants over 8 months.
findings.recommendation: Add screening pool, historical recruitment rate, or site feasibility evidence.

findings.finding: Follow-up visit attendance criterion needs an operational definition.
evidence: Able to attend scheduled imaging and treatment visits.
findings.recommendation: Define required visit windows, acceptable missed visits, remote visit options, and how attendance feasibility will be assessed.

findings.finding: Performance status eligibility is not operationally defined.
findings.evidence: No ECOG or performance status criterion found.
findings.recommendation: Define the accepted ECOG performance status range and how it will be documented.

findings.finding: Measurable disease requirement is not defined.
findings.evidence: No RECIST or measurable disease criterion found.
findings.recommendation: Clarify whether measurable disease is required and which response assessment standard will be used.

findings.finding: Biomarker and molecular eligibility rules are unclear.
findings.evidence: No EGFR, ALK, ROS1, PD-L1, or biomarker criterion found.
findings.recommendation: Define required biomarker testing, exclusion rules, and how missing results will be handled.

findings.evidence: No autoimmune disease, steroid, or immunosuppression criterion found.
findings.recommendation: Clarify autoimmune disease, immunosuppressive therapy, and steroid-use exclusions or monitoring rules.

findings.finding: Prior checkpoint inhibitor exposure is not clearly addressed.
findings.evidence: Eligibility criteria do not clearly state whether prior PD-1/PD-L1 or checkpoint inhibitor therapy is allowed.
findings.recommendation: Clarify prior immunotherapy exposure rules and washout requirements.

findings.finding: Adverse events are listed as data items, but the capture workflow is unclear.
findings.evidence: Expected data collection items include adverse events.
findings.recommendation: Specify how adverse events will be captured, reviewed, coded, and reconciled.
